page.html:
Hello I’m Shawon Ashraf. I’m from Dhaka, Bangladesh. A forever Java guy who’s tinkering with JavaScript and Swift now. A long time RPG fan who plays Overwatch like frenzy these days. I like to talk anything *nix and OSS.

Github : ShawonAshraf

What I was once

let mySelf = {
  cs_grad: 'A CS graduate from North South University, Dhaka.',
  msp: {
    timeline: '2014-2017',
    roles: [
      'MSP Campus Social Media Lead 2015-2016',
      'MSP Campus Lead  2016-2017'
    ]
  nsu_acm_student_chapter: {
    timeline: '2017-2018'
    roles: [
      'Vice Chair'
    ]
  }
}

MSP(Microsoft Student Partner) from 2014-2017. MSP Campus Social Media Lead 2015-2016 MSP Campus Lead 2016-2017. Vice Chair of NSU ACM Student Chapter from 2017-2018.

I love gaming, reading (almost anything!), travelling, photography, coding and eating(!). I spend most of my game time playing Overwatch and RPG games.

I was a long time Java guy, I still love Java though but these days I’m mostly after JS and Swift.

And I keep all my disastrous works on git, if you feel interested, have a look sometimes 🙂
